Social Media Policy
Social Media Policy
Social Media Policy 
Share to Facebook 
Share to X 
Share to WhatsApp 
Share to Email 
Print 
This policy applies to comments and content submitted to U.S. Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF) social media sites. 
The USPSTF encourages the public to share comments on social media posts to promote an active exchange of ideas. The USPSTF reserves the right to remove content that is inconsistent with the following policy. 
The USPSTF will remove posted content if it contains: 
Vulgar, profane, or abusive language; personal attacks of any kind; inappropriate religious, sexual, political, or racial references; or unsupported accusations.​ 
Endorsements of commercial products, services, organizations, or other entities.​ 
Endorsements of political parties, candidates, or groups.​ 
Content that infringes on copyright.​ 
Solicitation of funds.​
